name: Kids' 6pc 9.5" Plastic Square Divided Plate - Pillowfort™: Microwave & Dishwasher-Safe, Ages 3+
description: Serve a variety of fruits, snacks and other items to your kid on these 6-Piece 9.5-Inch Plastic Square Divided Plates from Pillowfort™. This pack of six dinner plates come in assorted colors for fun mixing and matching with their bowls, flatware and other dinnerware, and they have raised, divided sections to help prevent different foods from mixing. Made with plastic, these BPA-free plates can be tossed in the dishwasher for easy cleanup. Plus, they're microwave safe for reheating only.
